hero.description: AI Meeting Note is your smart meeting assistant. From brainstorming sessions to professional meetings and presentations, AI Meeting Note ensures every discussion is captured, transcribed and turned into clear, easy-to-follow documents.

summary.description: From recording to intelligent summaries, AI automatically aggregates and distills key information so you never miss anything important.

record.title: Record meetings
record.description: No more manual note-taking – every meeting is fully recorded so you can easily review, summarize and follow up later.

speechToText.title: Convert speech to text
speechToText.description: Speech-to-text keeps your meeting content secure and turns it into searchable transcripts that are easy to share and reuse.

summary.title: Meeting summary
summary.description: No need to rewatch the whole recording – all important information is pre-summarized for you by AI.

org.description: A single workspace to manage members, meetings and data, making it easy to share meeting content across your organization.

points.centralStorage: Centralized storage for meetings, minutes and notes
points.consistency: Consistent system that saves time and removes fragmentation

banner.title: Meetings this week
banner.description: You have 8 meetings scheduled this week.

meeting.address: No. 15, Alley 4, Cau Giay, Ha Noi

meeting.description: Centrally manage all meetings with recording playback, AI summaries and status tracking so you can stay on top of every discussion.

points.weeklyOverview: Weekly overview of the meetings you joined
points.statusTracking: Track meeting status (completed, in progress, upcoming)
points.storage: Store, replay recordings and review AI summaries

testimonials.description: Real-world experiences from teams and organizations that have optimized their meeting workflows with us.

nguyenA.name: Nguyễn Văn A
nguyenA.content: AI Meeting Note helps us save more than 40% of the time spent on meeting minutes. The tool is very easy to use and highly accurate.

tranB.name: Trần Thị B
tranB.content: Vietnamese transcription is highly accurate. AI summaries help the whole team grasp the content even when they miss the meeting.

leC.name: Lê Minh C
leC.content: Workspace management for the whole organization is very convenient. We use it every day for all our meetings.

phamD.name: Phạm Văn D
phamD.content: The interface is friendly and easy to use. Multilingual summarization is impressive and very helpful for our international team.

hoangE.name: Hoàng Thị E
hoangE.content: I no longer worry about missing key points in long meetings. AI handles this extremely effectively.

doF.name: Đỗ Minh F
doF.content: Storing and searching meeting minutes is faster than ever. A great solution for the digital workplace.

vuG.name: Vũ Anh G
vuG.content: High-quality recording with great noise reduction. Perfect for both online and offline meetings.

faq.description: Understanding how AI Meeting Note works helps you save time, reduce manual note-taking and increase meeting efficiency.

howItWorks.question: How does AI Meeting Note work?
howItWorks.answer: AI Meeting Note records your meetings, automatically transcribes speech into text and generates summaries of key points, decisions and follow-up actions.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the AI transcription?
accuracy.answer: AI Meeting Note uses state-of-the-art speech recognition technology, reaching up to 98% accuracy for Vietnamese and supporting multiple other languages.

minutes.question: Can AI Meeting Note automatically generate meeting minutes?
minutes.answer: Yes. The system automatically structures minutes into sections like meeting objectives, main discussion points, approved decisions and action items.

workspace.question: Can I create an organization and manage members?
workspace.answer: Absolutely. AI Meeting Note provides a workspace feature for businesses, allowing you to create organizations, manage members and control access to different meetings.

cta.heading: Start managing your meetings intelligently today

metadata.title: AI Meeting Note - Intelligent assistant for your meetings
metadata.description: AI Meeting Note records, transcribes and summarizes your meetings with AI to streamline minutes and boost productivity.
